channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Suspect Faces Federal Charges After Attempted Attack at White House Correspondents’ Dinner
item.description: Authorities have charged Cole Tomas Allen, 31, of Torrance, California, with the attempted assassination of former President Donald Trump following a violent incident at the White House Correspondents...

item.title: Katherine Legge to Compete in the 2026 Indy 500 with AJ Foyt Racing
item.description: Katherine Legge, a seasoned racing driver from England, is set to return to the Indianapolis 500 for the 2026 edition, marking her fifth participation in the prestigious race. She will be driving the ...

item.title: King Charles and Queen Camilla begin US state visit as alleged Trump assassination suspect Cole Allen appears in court
item.description: King Charles III and Queen Camilla have arrived in Washington for a four-day state visit to the United States, marking the 250th anniversary of American independence. The royal couple landed at Joint ...

item.title: Ramaphosa Highlights South Africa's Democratic Achievements and Ongoing Challenges on Freedom Day
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa commemorated Freedom Day in Bloemfontein by emphasising the importance of the democratic gains South Africans have achieved. He underscored initiatives such as student fundin...

item.title: Ukrainian robot aids elderly woman fleeing shelling near Lyman
item.description: In a remarkable demonstration of technology assisting civilians in conflict zones, a 77-year-old Ukrainian pensioner was rescued by a military robot while attempting to escape Russian shelling near Ly...

item.title: Regina man charged with second-degree murder in downtown fatality
item.description: Regina police have charged a 29-year-old man with second-degree murder following the death of 36-year-old Myles Anderson earlier this month. Officers responded to a call at approximately 1:15 a.m. on ...

item.title: King Charles and Queen Camilla begin four-day US state visit amid heightened security
item.description: King Charles III and Queen Camilla have commenced a four-day state visit to the United States, beginning in Washington, DC, despite recent security concerns following an attempted attack at a White Ho...

item.title: Melania Trump responds to Jimmy Kimmel’s controversial joke about her
item.description: Melania Trump has called out Jimmy Kimmel for his distasteful remark about her during a monologue, where he suggested she had the 'glow of an expectant widow'. This comment was made prior to a shootin...

item.title: LTFRB accelerates distribution of fuel subsidies to public transport operators
item.description: The Land Transportation Franchising and Regulatory Board (LTFRB) has accelerated efforts to distribute fuel subsidies to the transport sector, aiming to complete the process by next week. On Monday, L...

item.title: Pakistan highlights maritime security risks and Hormuz Strait tensions at UN Security Council
item.description: Pakistan, through its Permanent Representative Ambassador Asim Iftikhar Ahmad, addressed the UN Security Council warning about rising threats to global trade and economic stability due to disruptions ...

item.title: Possible 2027 Deal: Joho Considered for Deputy President Role in ODM-UDA Talks
item.description: So, there's been a proper buzz around the political scene after Governor Gladys Wanga from Homa Bay put forward the idea that ODM (Orange Democratic Movement) should seriously consider former Mombasa ...

item.title: Zuma Plans Discussion with Ramaphosa on Liberation Legacy Dispute
item.description: Former president Jacob Zuma, now leader of the uMkhonto weSizwe (MK) Party, has announced plans to meet ANC president Cyril Ramaphosa to address ongoing disputes regarding the legacy of South Africa's...

item.title: Video of police observer warning TMC candidate in West Bengal sparks political controversy
item.description: A video from West Bengal has triggered a political storm after Uttar Pradesh police officer Ajay Pal Sharma, who is serving as a police observer in South 24 Parganas, was seen warning Falta TMC candid...

item.title: Florida murder suspect reportedly sought advice from AI on body disposal
item.description: Hisham Abugharbieh, a suspect in a recent Florida student murder case, reportedly used the AI tool ChatGPT to inquire about methods for disposing of a body. Law enforcement officials indicated that th...

item.title: Jammu and Kashmir High Court overturns preventive detention of AAP MLA Mehraj Malik
item.description: The Jammu and Kashmir High Court on Monday nullified the preventive detention of Aam Aadmi Party legislator Mehraj Malik under the Public Safety Act (PSA), which had been imposed by the Doda district ...

item.title: Four Suspected Drug Dealers Arrested During Security Operation in Molo
item.description: In a major security operation in Molo town, Nakuru County, police arrested four suspected drug peddlers as part of efforts to curb drug abuse and criminal activity. The operation, led by Nakuru Police...

item.title: Excerpt from ‘Shampoo and Daddy!’ explores an unlikely friendship in a children’s comic
item.description: This article presents an excerpt from the children’s comic book ‘Shampoo and Daddy!’ by Aditi Mali, published by Indian Summer Press. The story centres on an unusual yet heartwarming friendship betwee...

item.title: Pastrana leads UST to a strong opening in UAAP women's 3x3
item.description: In a dominant performance, Kent Pastrana powered the University of Santo Tomas (UST) to a perfect start in the UAAP women’s 3x3 basketball tournament on April 27, 2026. Pastrana showcased her skills a...

item.title: DOJ says Zaldy Co held in Europe carried expired passport and lacks valid travel documents
item.description: Ayon sa Department of Justice (DOJ), si Zaldy Co ay naharang ng mga awtoridad sa Europe dahil sa paggamit ng expired na pasaporte. Sinabi ni Acting Justice Secretary Fredderick Vida na ang dokumentong...

item.title: Three New Liberal MPs Sworn In, Solidifying Prime Minister Carney's Majority Government
item.description: Three newly elected Liberal Members of Parliament have officially taken their seats in the House of Commons, solidifying Prime Minister Mark Carney's majority government. Doly Begum and Danielle Marti...
